# `library_codex.string.Manacher`

奇数・偶数半径・全中心極大回文列挙。

- 計算量の目安: $O(N)$
- source: [`string/Manacher.py`](../../../string/Manacher.py)
- 公開API: function 7、class 0、method/property 0（Python protocol 0を含む）

```python

    manacher,
    manacher_even,
    palindrome_radii,
    enumerate_palindrome_lengths,
    enumerate_palindromes,
    get_palindromes,
    enumerate_leftmost_palindromes,

```
